channel.title: KeyLeak Detector Blog
channel.description: Runtime secret scanning, API key leaks, and BaaS (Supabase/Firebase) security.

item.title: The Key Your Scanner Swore Wasn't There
item.description: GitLeaks, TruffleHog, and GitHub secret scanning all came back green — and a researcher still pulled a live Stripe key out of your running app in under a minute.

item.title: The Public Key Was Never the Problem: Why Vibe-Coded Apps Leak
item.description: AI tools ship full-stack apps in minutes and skip the one config step that keeps your database from being world-readable. Here's how to catch it before you ship.
